era_context: The Iron Age II Levant and Eastern Mediterranean. The Neo-Assyrian Empire is in a phase of consolidation under Shalmaneser IV. In Greece, the Archaic period continues with the development of the polis system and early colonization movements. Egypt remains fragmented under the late 22nd Dynasty. The Kingdom of Israel has recently fallen to Assyrian pressure (northern kingdom will be conquered within a generation).
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: This year falls within a period of sparse documentation. No specific events of major historical significance are attested for 788 BCE in surviving sources. The broader context of Assyrian consolidation and Greek Archaic development continues, but no particular year-specific events are recorded. This reflects both the limitations of ancient documentation and the genuine possibility that no major recorded events occurred in this particular year.
